name: Walker Bay 22
description: The Walker Bay 22 is the flagship luxury runabout of the Walker Bay lineup, designed as a bold and elegant performance RIB. It features a unique rear-positioned helm that maximizes bow space and provides a more comfortable, shock-absorbing ride for the driver in rough conditions. Built with the proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer grid and DuraTech™ vacuum RTM fiberglass construction, it offers a high strength-to-weight ratio and positive flotation. This model is engineered for versatility, serving equally well as a social entertaining platform, a watersports tow boat, or a long-range coastal explorer.
features: Modified Deep-V Hull for dry, smooth handling
Rear-Positioned Helm for expanded bow space
XL Dashboard (Fits dual 12" flush-mounted chart plotters)
Side Boarding Steps & Rear Walkway Door
Dedicated Compartment for Portable Head & Privacy Curtain (Optional)

construction.material: DuraTech™ Fiberglass Hull / ORCA (CSM) Hypalon Tubes

name: Generation 12 DLX
description: The Generation 12 DLX is a premier 12-foot luxury yacht tender designed for those who refuse to compromise on comfort or performance. Built using Walker Bay's proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer grid, the hull and deck are bonded into a single high-strength piece for superior durability and a smoother ride. Its wide-body design provides exceptional stability and ample legroom, while the modified Deep-V hull with concave chines ensures passengers stay dry and comfortable even in choppy conditions.
features: Proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer Grid
L-shaped Bow Seating with integrated storage
Integrated 45L (12 Gal) Marine Grade Fuel Tank
Deluxe Stern Bench Seat with High Backrest
Integrated Stern Boarding Steps with EVA Foam
Stainless Steel Cup Holders and Handrails

name: Generation 15 DLX
description: The Generation 15 DLX is a mid-sized luxury RIB that offers a perfect balance of performance and refined comfort. Designed as a high-end yacht tender or a standalone day boat, it features a spacious interior layout with a signature L-shaped bow bench and a high-back stern seat. Its heavy-duty deep-V hull is reinforced with a proprietary micro-stringer grid, providing a smooth, dry ride and exceptional tracking. With a 75HP rating, it delivers the power needed for watersports and long-range cruising.
features: Proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer Grid
Deep V-Hull with Concave Chines for a dry ride
Extra-Wide Rear Bench Seat with high backrest
Integrated 64L (17 Gal) Marine Grade Fuel Tank
Deluxe Console with Smoked Windscreen and Grab Rail
Stainless Steel Cup Holders and Bow Rails

name: Generation DLX Series
description: The Generation DLX series is the hallmark of Walker Bay’s luxury RIB lineup, blending elegant styling with high-performance engineering. Built with a proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer grid, the hull and deck are bonded into a single, incredibly strong piece. The modified Deep-V hull with concave chines is designed to deflect water downward for a dry, smooth ride. Every detail, from the ergonomic seating to the integrated fuel systems and specialized storage, is crafted to provide a premium experience whether used as a yacht tender or a primary day boat.
features: Proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer Grid
Deluxe Console with Smoked Windshield and Grab Rail
L-shaped Bow Bench Seating with Integrated Storage
Integrated Marine Grade Aluminum Fuel Tank
Integrated Stern Boarding Steps with EVA Foam

variants.name: Generation 340 DLX
variants.description: An 11-foot luxury tender that packs full-size features into a compact frame, ideal for mid-sized yacht davits.

variants.name: Generation 360 DLX
variants.description: A spacious 12-foot variant with increased interior volume and stability for comfortable guest transport.

variants.name: Generation 400 DLX
variants.description: The 13-foot model offering best-in-class legroom and a larger payload capacity for active families.

variants.name: Generation 450 DLX
variants.description: A performance-oriented 15-foot RIB rated for 75HP, delivering superior handling in open water.

variants.name: Generation 525 DLX
variants.description: The flagship 17-foot model in the DLX line, providing maximum seating, power, and fuel range for offshore use.

name: Generation LTE Series
description: The Generation LTE (Lightweight) series is a specialized category of console RIB tenders designed to provide the styling and innovative features of the premium Generation DLX line in a significantly lighter construction. Engineered for swim platforms or cranes with weight restrictions, these tenders utilize Walker Bay's proprietary Composite Micro Stringer grid to bond the hull and deck into one piece. This results in a boat that is not only lighter and stronger but also quicker to plane and better at absorbing chop. Each model is available in two layouts: a 3-seat pedestal configuration for maximum legroom or a 4-seat bench configuration for additional passenger comfort.
features: Proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer Grid
Flared V-Hull for a smooth, dry ride
Ergonomic Console with Hand Rail and Smoked Windscreen
Extra Wide Rear Seat with 3D Ergonomic Cushions
Deluxe Bow Step with Integrated Backrest Cushion
Heavy Duty Stainless Steel Towing Rings (2)
Low Profile LED Bow Light and Rear Pole Light
ORCA (CSM) Hypalon or Heytex PVC Tube Options

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Hypalon or PVC Tubes

variants.name: Generation 10 LTE
variants.description: A 10-foot lightweight deluxe tender, perfect for smaller yachts and weight-sensitive davit systems.

variants.name: Generation 11 LTE
variants.description: The mid-sized LTE model offering a balance of increased capacity and portability.

variants.name: Generation 12 LTE
variants.description: The largest in the LTE line, providing extra storage and horsepower while remaining under critical lifting weight limits.

name: Venture Series
description: The Venture series is a versatile, high-end yacht tender designed for explorers. Built on a modified Deep-V hull with concave chines, it delivers a superior dry ride and aggressive handling. Its standout feature is a spacious, open-concept deck layout with a unique 'extra-large' bow area, designed to maximize passenger comfort and cargo capacity. The hull is constructed using a high-density Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer grid, making it lighter and stronger than traditional fiberglass structures.
features: Proprietary Polyurethane Composite Micro Stringer Grid
Deep V-Hull with Concave Chines for a dry ride
Extra-Large Bow Seating Area with backrest
Deluxe Console with Smoked Windshield and Grab Rail

variants.name: Venture 13
variants.description: The most compact Venture model, designed to offer maximum deck space and luxury features in a 13-foot footprint.

variants.name: Venture 14
variants.description: A 14-foot luxury tender that maximizes interior space, offering more usable deck area than most RIBs in its class.

variants.name: Venture 16
variants.description: The largest in the Venture series, providing an expanded platform for offshore capability and increased passenger capacity.

name: STX Series
description: The STX Series represents Walker Bay's premier line of aluminum-hull RIBs, engineered for owners who require a lightweight, durable, and low-maintenance tender. These boats are built with a high-quality marine-grade aluminum hull that is chromated and powder-coated for maximum corrosion resistance. The STX design focuses on performance and versatility, offering a dry ride and impressive stability. Its lightweight nature makes it an ideal choice for smaller davits or swim platforms while providing the ruggedness needed for beaching on rocky shores.
features: Marine Grade Aluminum Hull (Chromated & Powder Coated)
ORCA (CSM) Hypalon or PVC Tube Options
Large Diameter Tubes for increased buoyancy

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / Hypalon or PVC Tubes

variants.name: STX 270
variants.description: The most compact model in the STX line, designed for easy handling and storage on smaller vessels.

variants.name: STX 310
variants.description: A versatile 10-foot aluminum RIB that balances weight with significant carrying capacity.

variants.name: STX 340
variants.description: The largest STX variant, providing the most interior space and stability for crew and gear transport.
